response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "IngestData",
      "purpose": "Read and store raw input data into raw_data store",
      "behavior": "Parse input JSON, extract source, read data from source, store in raw_data, log ingestion",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["reading input source", "storing raw data", "logging ingestion"], "out_of_scope": ["transformation", "validation", "export"]},
      "preconditions": ["input contains valid source"],
      "postconditions": ["raw_data store populated"],
      "guarantees": ["raw_data is stored for further processing"],
      "composition_role": "transform",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with action and source", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "raw_data", "op": "write", "reason": "store ingested raw data for downstream processing"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "ingestion_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status and records count", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def IngestData(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "raw_data", "op": "write", "description": "store ingested raw data for downstream processing"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "raw_data", "operation_type": "write", "description": "store ingested raw data for downstream processing"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["raw_data.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "raw_data must be writable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "raw_data is populated after ingestion"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "TransformData",
      "purpose": "Apply transformation rules to raw data and store in processed_data",
      "behavior": "Read raw_data, apply transformations (e.g., cleaning, mapping), write to processed_data, log transformation",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["reading raw_data", "applying transformations", "writing processed_data", "logging"], "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "validation", "export"]},
      "preconditions": ["raw_data is available"],
      "postconditions": ["processed_data store populated"],
      "guarantees": ["transformed data is stored"],
      "composition_role": "transform",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "trigger", "type": "dict", "description": "signal to start transformation", "source": "parent"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "raw_data", "op": "read", "reason": "read raw data for transformation"}, {"resource": "processed_data", "op": "write", "reason": "store transformed data for validation"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "transformation_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status and records transformed", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def TransformData(trigger: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "raw_data", "op": "read", "description": "read raw data for transformation"},
        {"variable": "processed_data", "op": "write", "description": "store transformed data for validation"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "raw_data", "operation_type": "read", "description": "read raw data for transformation"},
        {"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "write", "description": "store transformed data for validation"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["raw_data.read", "processed_data.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "raw_data must be readable"}, {"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "processed_data must be writable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "processed_data is populated after transformation"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ValidateQuality",
      "purpose": "Check processed data for quality and filter valid records",
      "behavior": "Read processed_data, apply validation rules (e.g., schema, range), mark invalid records, log validation results",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["reading processed_data", "validating records", "filtering invalid", "logging"], "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "transformation", "export"]},
      "preconditions": ["processed_data is available"],
      "postconditions": ["valid records identified"],
      "guarantees": ["invalid records are excluded from export"],
      "composition_role": "validate",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "trigger", "type": "dict", "description": "signal to start validation", "source": "parent"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "processed_data", "op": "read", "reason": "read processed data for validation"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "validation_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with valid records count and errors list", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ValidateQuality(trigger: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "processed_data", "op": "read", "description": "read processed data for validation"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "read", "description": "read processed data for validation"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["processed_data.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "processed_data must be readable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "validation results produced"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ExportResults",
      "purpose": "Export only valid records to output",
      "behavior": "Read valid records from processed_data (based on validation), format output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data, log export",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["reading valid records", "formatting output", "logging export"], "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "transformation", "validation"]},
      "preconditions": ["validation completed"],
      "postconditions": ["output is produced"],
      "guarantees": ["only valid records are exported"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "validation_result", "type": "dict", "description": "validation results containing valid records info", "source": "ValidateQuality output"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "processed_data", "op": "read", "reason": "read processed data to extract valid records for export"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "output", "type": "dict", "description": "Final JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ExportResults(validation_result: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "processed_data", "op": "read", "description": "read processed data to extract valid records for export"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "read", "description": "read processed data to extract valid records for export"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["processed_data.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-005", "description": "processed_data must be readable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "output is produced with valid records"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "All children derive global_vars and data_operations directly from internal_leaf_accesses. Each resource operation in internal_leaf_accesses has a corresponding entry in both global_vars and data_operations. No exceptions needed. Capabilities are derived as resource.operation. Constraints enforce resource availability. Acceptance criteria verify resource state changes.",
  "resource_audit": {
    "signature_preservation_detail": "All signatures remain unchanged from Stage 2. No modifications to call_inputs, outputs, or function signatures.",
    "internal_leaf_mapping_detail": "Each internal_leaf_accesses entry maps directly to one global_vars entry and one data_operations entry. IngestData: raw_data.write. TransformData: raw_data.read, processed_data.write. ValidateQuality: processed_data.read. ExportResults: processed_data.read.",
    "global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail": "global_vars and data_operations are perfectly synchronized. For each child, the number and content of entries match exactly. No orphaned entries.",
    "coverage_detail": "All resources referenced in internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. raw_data appears in IngestData (write) and TransformData (read). processed_data appears in TransformData (write), ValidateQuality (read), and ExportResults (read). No resource is missed.",
    "final_status": "ok"
  }
}
